summary: Completed comprehensive mobile responsiveness testing for LuminaLMS. All responsive features are working correctly on both mobile (375px) and desktop (1920px) viewports.
passed_tests: Login page displays correctly on mobile (375px width) - form centered, all inputs visible
Admin dashboard displays stat cards in 2-column grid on mobile
Admin mobile hamburger menu opens correctly when clicked
Admin mobile menu contains all navigation items (Home, Users, Courses, Admissions, Payments, Settings)
Admin mobile menu shows user info (avatar, name, role)
Admin mobile menu has Sign out button at bottom
Admin mobile menu closes when clicking X button
Admin mobile menu closes when clicking overlay
Student dashboard displays stat cards in 2-column grid on mobile
Student dashboard shows gradient banner with streak indicator on mobile
Student mobile menu opens correctly with hamburger button
Student mobile menu contains navigation items (Home, Courses, Billing)
School landing page displays correctly on mobile with hamburger menu
School mobile menu contains all nav items (Home, Courses, About Us, Contact) plus Student Portal button
School footer displays in 2-column grid on mobile (Quick Links + Programs side by side)
Course detail page displays stats in 3-column grid on mobile (Weeks, Modules, Certificate)
Course detail application form is scrollable and accessible on mobile
All form inputs visible and functional on mobile course application
Document upload fields visible on mobile application form
Desktop login page shows split layout (form left, image right)
Desktop admin dashboard shows full sidebar navigation
Desktop admin dashboard displays stat cards in 4-column grid
Desktop school landing page shows floating stat cards at hero bottom
Desktop school landing page has full horizontal navigation
Desktop school footer displays in 4-column grid
critical_code_review_comments: Mobile menu implementation uses proper z-index layering (z-40 for overlay, z-50 for menu)
Responsive grid classes properly defined: grid-cols-2 for mobile, lg:grid-cols-4 for desktop
Mobile menu closes on route change via useEffect dependency on location.pathname
Footer uses col-span-2 for proper mobile layout
Course detail stats use grid-cols-3 with responsive spacing (gap-2 md:gap-4)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile responsiveness features verified and working. Mobile menu implementation in DashboardLayout.jsx uses proper overlay and slide-out patterns. School app at localhost:3001 has its own mobile menu implementation in Navbar component. Desktop views use full sidebar navigation. Stats use responsive grid layouts.

features_verified.login_mobile_responsive: PASSED - Form displays correctly at 375px width
features_verified.school_mobile_menu: PASSED - All nav items plus Student Portal
features_verified.desktop_sidebar_navigation: PASSED - Full sidebar with all items
